---
title: "UIAO Delegation Matrix (AUs + Scoped Roles)"
subtitle: "Schema Reference · admin-units.schema.json"
date: 2026-05-14
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Developer Reference

This is a UIAO JSON Schema, rendered as a developer-reference page per
[ADR-072](../../adr/adr-072-canon-publication-policy.qmd).

- **Source:** [`src/uiao/schemas/orgpath/admin-units.schema.json`](../../../src/uiao/schemas/orgpath/admin-units.schema.json)
- **Dialect:** `https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema`
- **`$id`:** `https://uiao.io/schemas/orgpath/admin-units.schema.json`
:::

## Description

Machine-readable enumeration of Entra ID Administrative Units and scoped role assignments. Bound to UIAO_154 (src/uiao/canon/UIAO_154_Delegation_Matrix_AUs_Roles.md) by ADR-037. Depends on codebook (UIAO_151/ADR-035) and dynamic-groups (UIAO_152/ADR-036) — loader enforces cross-canon integrity.

## Top-Level Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|:---:|---|
| `schema_version` | string | ✓ |  |
| `document_id` | `const: 'UIAO_154'` | ✓ |  |
| `parent_canon` | string | ✓ |  |
| `updated` | string |  |  |
| `naming` | object | ✓ |  |
| `administrative_units` | array&lt;`$ref: #/$defs/administrativeUnit`&gt; | ✓ |  |
| `roles` | array&lt;`$ref: #/$defs/role`&gt; | ✓ |  |
| `admin_groups` | array&lt;`$ref: #/$defs/adminGroup`&gt; | ✓ |  |
| `role_assignments` | array&lt;`$ref: #/$defs/roleAssignment`&gt; | ✓ |  |

## Full Schema

```{.json filename="admin-units.schema.json"}
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "https://uiao.io/schemas/orgpath/admin-units.schema.json",
  "title": "UIAO Delegation Matrix (AUs + Scoped Roles)",
  "description": "Machine-readable enumeration of Entra ID Administrative Units and scoped role assignments. Bound to UIAO_154 (src/uiao/canon/UIAO_154_Delegation_Matrix_AUs_Roles.md) by ADR-037. Depends on codebook (UIAO_151/ADR-035) and dynamic-groups (UIAO_152/ADR-036) \u2014 loader enforces cross-canon integrity.",
  "type": "object",
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "required": [
    "schema_version",
    "document_id",
    "parent_canon",
    "naming",
    "administrative_units",
    "roles",
    "admin_groups",
    "role_assignments"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_version": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+$"
    },
    "document_id": {
      "const": "UIAO_154"
    },
    "parent_canon": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "updated": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date"
    },
    "naming": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "au_prefix",
        "au_regex",
        "admin_group_regex"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "au_prefix": {
          "const": "AU-ORG"
        },
        "au_regex": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "admin_group_regex": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        }
      }
    },
    "administrative_units": {
      "type": "array",
      "minItems": 1,
      "uniqueItems": true,
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/administrativeUnit"
      }
    },
    "roles": {
      "type": "array",
      "minItems": 1,
      "uniqueItems": true,
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/role"
      }
    },
    "admin_groups": {
      "type": "array",
      "uniqueItems": true,
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/adminGroup"
      }
    },
    "role_assignments": {
      "type": "array",
      "minItems": 1,
      "uniqueItems": true,
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/roleAssignment"
      }
    }
  },
  "$defs": {
    "administrativeUnit": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "name",
        "tier",
        "membership_rule",
        "orgpath_refs",
        "restricted",
        "description"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "name": {
          "type": "string",
          "pattern": "^AU-ORG(-[A-Za-z0-9]+)*$"
        },
        "tier": {
          "enum": [
            "enterprise",
            "division",
            "department"
          ]
        },
        "membership_rule": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1,
          "pattern": "^\\(user\\.extensionAttribute1 "
        },
        "orgpath_refs": {
          "type": "array",
          "minItems": 1,
          "uniqueItems": true,
          "items": {
            "type": "string",
            "pattern": "^ORG(-[A-Z0-9]{2,6}){0,8}$"
          }
        },
        "restricted": {
          "description": "Every AU in this matrix must be a Restricted Management AU (UIAO_154 \u00a7Restricted Management).",
          "const": true
        },
        "description": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        }
      }
    },
    "role": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "display_name",
        "template_id"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "display_name": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "template_id": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Microsoft Graph roleDefinitionId (well-known built-in template GUID).",
          "pattern": "^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$"
        }
      }
    },
    "adminGroup": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "name",
        "description",
        "governance_workflow"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "name": {
          "type": "string",
          "pattern": "^OrgTree-[A-Za-z0-9]+(-[A-Za-z0-9]+)*-Admins$"
        },
        "description": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "governance_workflow": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        }
      }
    },
    "roleAssignment": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "role",
        "principal_group",
        "au_scope",
        "tier",
        "purpose"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "role": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "principal_group": {
          "type": "string",
          "pattern": "^OrgTree-[A-Za-z0-9]+(-[A-Za-z0-9]+)*-(Users|Licensed|CA|Admins)$"
        },
        "au_scope": {
          "type": "string",
          "pattern": "^AU-ORG(-[A-Za-z0-9]+)*$"
        },
        "tier": {
          "enum": [
            "tier-1",
            "tier-2",
            "tier-3"
          ]
        },
        "purpose": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```
